prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait only as the identity and hairstyle reference. Preserve the real facial identity, face shape, natural facial features, skin tone, and twin-braid hairstyle. Do not copy the original clothes, background, lighting, or pose.

Create a realistic live-action vertical 9:16 indoor portrait of an adult young woman lying comfortably on a soft pastel pink plush sofa in a cute cozy room. She wears a light blue JK-inspired sailor uniform with a white blouse, pastel blue sailor collar, matching pleated skirt, white frilly ankle socks, and cream Mary Jane shoes. Her legs are bent upward naturally behind her, and she gently holds a pink ribbon-decorated cream cake on a white plate near the camera. Add soft pastel pillows, a flower-shaped cushion, framed wall art, warm clean daylight, and a dreamy kawaii room atmosphere. Natural skin texture, sharp facial details, realistic hands and legs, clean anatomy, soft flash photography, premium real-camera look, no watermark, no text, no logo.

Negative Prompt:
watermark, logo, text, anime, cartoon, illustration, doll face, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, changed identity, different face, wrong hairstyle, blurry face, bad eyes, extra fingers, deformed hands, broken wrists, unnatural legs, twisted feet, bad anatomy, duplicated person, messy background, low quality, oversaturated colors, harsh distortion, exposed underwear, sexualized pose.
